notes: IBM remains active; Enterprise Server Group reorganized multiple times. Acquired Lotus 1995; sold Notes/Domino to HCL 2019.

successor: Aberdeen (Harte-Hanks successor); now part of Aberdeen Strategy & Research
notes: Aberdeen Group was acquired by Harte-Hanks in 2001; brand continued under various owners.
IBM acquired Lotus for $3.5B in 1995; sold Notes/Domino to HCL Technologies for $1.8B in 2019.
Transarc developed Encina TP monitor and AFS filesystem. Acquired by IBM; Encina bundled into TXSeries until removed in 2006.
Powersoft merged with Sybase in 1994; PowerBuilder product continued under Sybase then SAP ownership.
